column1: # Audit/navigation only: this file is intentionally not consumed by the source-label
# or objdiff pipeline. _$E<n> is a TU-local emission ordinal, not semantic identity;
# its numeric suffix can change when declarations or compiler emission order change.
# Deterministic compiler-generated symbols (for example ??_G deleting destructors)
# remain RVA_COMPGEN source bindings. Only volatile ordinal helpers belong here.
